title: Aegis Agent Permissions Manifest
description: Single source of truth for per-agent tool permissions (AG-0008). One file at manifest/permissions.json. Carries a plugin-level cross-cutting deny block, a read-only default baseline, and a per-agent override map keyed by canonical agent name. The projector reads the concrete claude.tools and opencode.permission objects (buckets are expanded, not named) to emit Claude tools:/disallowedTools: and OpenCode agent.<name>.permission blocks. See .aegis/specs/features/ag-0008-agent-permissions/.

schemaVersion.description: Manifest schema version. Bump on a breaking shape change.

plugin.description: Plugin-level, cross-cutting rules inherited by every agent regardless of allowlist (D5). Projected into Claude .claude-plugin/plugin.json permissions.deny[] and into OpenCode global permission.read deny entries.

deny.description: Cross-cutting deny rules (secrets, destructive shell). Claude-style rule strings, e.g. Read(./.env) or Bash(rm -rf /).

defaults.description: Read-only baseline (D2). Every agent inherits this unless its own entry overrides it. Bucket is RO: Claude [Read, Grep, Glob]; OpenCode {*: deny, read/grep/glob/list: allow}.

agents.description: Per-agent override map. Key is the canonical agent name (matches agents/<name>.md frontmatter name:). Every agent in agents/ MUST have an entry (validator-enforced).

bucket.description: Named permission bucket from the per-agent-permissions matrix. Documentation/grouping only — the projector reads the expanded claude/opencode objects, not this name.

claudeTool.description: A Claude tool-allowlist entry. Either a bare tool name, a scoped Bash form Bash(...), or an MCP pattern mcp__server__tool / mcp__*.

claudeSet.description: Claude projection target. tools[] is the positive allowlist (D3). disallowedTools[] is reserved for the rare per-agent denylist case.

opencodeBash.description: OpenCode bash permission: either a single verdict, or a map of command-glob -> verdict (scoped allowlist). The * key sets the default verdict for unmatched commands.

opencodeSet.description: OpenCode agent.<name>.permission object (D4). Known keys are enumerated; the map stays open-ended for forward-compat (e.g. doom_loop, custom tool ids). The * key is the catch-all default verdict.

permissionSet.description: A concrete Claude + OpenCode permission pairing. Used by both defaults and per-agent entries.

agentEntry.description: One agent's permission declaration. bucket/claude/opencode are required (the projector reads concrete tools/permission). justification documents why; prose carries the verbatim read-only claim from the agent body for the drift-lint.

justification.description: One-line rationale for the assigned bucket / any elevation beyond the RO baseline.

prose.description: Verbatim read-only claim quoted from the agent body. Consumed by the drift-lint (D7) to confirm declared permissions do not contradict the agent's stated posture.
